mission: Privacy-first, defensive, non-executing second-opinion scanner for suspicious files, archives, scripts, AI-agent logs, exported data bundles, and local workflow artifacts.
current_milestone: Rule Pack Editor UI for local rule-pack validation and editing

allowed: read local files for static scanning
apply local trusted baselines as ALLOW_LOG
load metadata-only scan results for UI review
load metadata-only trusted baseline entries for UI review
compare two local baseline JSON files by SHA256
load and validate local file-AV rule packs
write explicit operator-requested rule-pack JSON copies
not_allowed: upload raw scanned contents by default
silently trust files from rule packs
publish private Poole Math / Poole Manifold / Poole Defect Calculus IP

current_next_best_move: Test v4.4 locally with pytest, repo safety check, privacy leak check, desktop --status, rule-pack-load/export/update, and a baseline-aware scan. Upload the generated privacy bundle before pushing v4.4.
